generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder positioned on the drive shaft, provides high‑resolution motor angle"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderStream
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox, measures gearbox output angle"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderStream
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor I_M measuring motor input current in real time"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentStream
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction – Data transmitted via MQTT
instance MotorEncoderStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Data items (measured and derived)
instance MotorEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor shaft angle r_M measured by MotorEncoder"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEngine, WebDashboard
]

instance GearboxEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox shaft angle r_G measured by GearboxEncoder"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEngine, WebDashboard
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current I_M streamed from MotorCurrentSensor"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEngine, WebDashboard
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque τ calculated from I_M, r_M and motor parameters"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEngine, WebDashboard
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity ω derived from successive angle measurements"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderStream, GearboxEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEngine, WebDashboard
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration α derived from angular velocity data"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEngine, WebDashboard
]

// C10: Engineering and simulation models
instance SysMLFirstAxisStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component‑&‑connector diagram of the first robot axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox)"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEngine
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxFrictionlessModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearbox without friction (ideal transmission)"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxFrictionModel_CoulombViscous : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑viscous friction for the gearbox"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxFrictionModel_Stribeck : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction characteristics"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxFrictionModel_Dahl : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Dahl friction dynamics"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxFrictionModel_LuGre : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing the LuGre friction model"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MqttBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker used for real‑time streaming of sensor and derived data"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService
]

instance SimulinkFrictionEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink simulation engine executing motor and gearbox friction models"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, ModelBasedControlImprovementService
]

instance WebDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard visualizing measured vs. simulated data and friction parameters"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, DataAggregationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualisation of measured versus simulated torque and velocity traces"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight
]

instance ModelBasedControlImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Improves model‑based controller accuracy by feeding back identified friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction
]

instance DataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregates time‑series data for offline analysis and parameter tuning"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterTuningAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) derived from live data"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deviation metrics between simulated and measured motion indicating accuracy gaps"
]

// C17: Actions
instance ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update of robot control algorithm with newly identified friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterTuningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual or automated tuning of friction model parameters based on aggregated data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Optional: Asset representation (first axis)
instance FirstAxisAsset : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox)"
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisDigitalShadow
]

instance FirstAxisDigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital twin representing the first axis and its virtual artifacts"
    base:contains FirstAxisAsset, SimulinkFrictionEngine, WebDashboard, MqttBroker, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor, MotorEncoderStream, GearboxEncoderStream, MotorCurrentStream, MotorEncoderAngleData, GearboxEncoderAngleData, MotorCurrentData, DerivedTorqueData, DerivedAngularVelocityData, DerivedAccelerationData, SysMLFirstAxisStructuralModel, SimulinkMotorModel, SimulinkGearboxFrictionlessModel, SimulinkGearboxFrictionModel_CoulombViscous, SimulinkGearboxFrictionModel_Stribeck, SimulinkGearboxFrictionModel_Dahl, SimulinkGearboxFrictionModel_LuGre
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None – the digital shadow is a passive (one‑way) representation and does not send commands back to the robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time synchronization with the sensor stream (online update of data traces as new measurements arrive)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow constellation composed of the FrictionShadow instance, purpose class FrictionDerivation, asset class Mabi, processing components (Simulation_M, Simulation_GW, Simulation_GB) that consume input traces and produce simulated traces, all linked through the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operative stage – the digital shadow is created and used during runtime to monitor and improve the robot’s motion control; design and manufacturing stages are not represented."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each data point to its source and processing component; continuous validation by comparing simulated friction‑compensated output with measured reference data; use of both white‑box (analytical) and black‑box (data‑driven) models to capture model uncertainty."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data from the robot is transmitted to the digital shadow over MQTT; the connection is unidirectional and ties each data trace to its originating sensor channel."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses the Industry 4.0 Asset Administration Shell (AAS) specification for metadata and conforms to SysML modeling standards; simulation models follow MATLAB/Simulink conventions."
]
